prompt: third-person platformer, collect coins on floating islands

ctx_extensions.name: getTerrainHeight
ctx_extensions.description: Returns Y height of the nearest platform surface at world (x,z). Returns -Infinity if no platform beneath that point.

ctx_extensions.name: islandPositions
ctx_extensions.signature: Array<{x: number, y: number, z: number, hw: number, hd: number}>
ctx_extensions.description: Array of island center positions and half-extents (hw=halfWidth, hd=halfDepth). Set during environment.build().

ctx_extensions.name: network.send
ctx_extensions.description: Send a typed message to the server.

ctx_extensions.name: network.onMessage
ctx_extensions.description: Register a handler for a server message type.

ctx_extensions.name: network.getSessionId
ctx_extensions.description: Returns the local player's session ID.

ctx_extensions.name: player.getPosition
ctx_extensions.description: Returns the local player's current world position.

events.name: coin:collected
events.payload: { coinId: string, playerId: string, position: {x: number, y: number, z: number} }

events.name: score:updated
events.payload: { playerId: string, score: number, scores: {[sessionId: string]: number} }

events.name: player:spawned
events.payload: { playerId: string, position: {x: number, y: number, z: number} }

client_to_server.payload: { x: number, y: number, z: number, rotY: number }

server_to_client.payload: { collectedCoins: string[], scores: {[sessionId]: number}, players: string[] }
{ sessionId: string, x: number, y: number, z: number, rotY: number }

gameplay_spec.win_condition: First player to collect 10 coins wins

contract_warnings: Rapier WASM must be initialized before any physics module runs — harness handles this.
ctx.getTerrainHeight and ctx.islandPositions are set by environment.build() — modules in Wave B can rely on these in build() since environment builds first via manifest order.
Network module must gracefully handle server being unavailable (singleplayer fallback).
Player module must expose getPosition() so gameplay can check coin proximity.
